<!-- indicator: fig-no-vehicles -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-no-vehicles
#| fig-cap: 'Percentage of Households with No Vehicles Available, 2021–2023'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Percentage of Households with No Vehicles Available, 2021–2023.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-no-vehicles", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
